description: Audit rules for corporate-launcher rendered output. Consumed by audit-launcher.py. Add new rules by appending to the 'rules' array; no Python changes required.

variables.CORP_SLUG: Slug name of the corporate launcher binary (e.g. 'acme-copilot').
variables.FORBIDDEN_TERMS: Terms that must only appear in BRANDING (e.g. 'Claude', 'Anthropic', 'OpenAI', 'Gemini').
variables.VPN_REQUIRED: yes|no - whether VPN check is mandatory.
variables.ACCEPT_TLS_INSPECTION: yes|no - whether corporate MITM TLS proxy is trusted.
variables.CC_NEEDS_STRIP_PROXY: yes|no - whether proxy-stripping shim is required.
variables.KILL_SWITCHES: List of telemetry env vars to disable (e.g. DISABLE_TELEMETRY=1).
variables.MCP_SERVERS: Names of MCP servers configured for the launcher.

rules.description: Launcher entry-point binary must not contain hardcoded vendor URLs
rules.remediation: Move vendor URL to permissions.deny in settings.json, route via corporate gateway, or remove.

rules.description: Install/uninstall scripts must not reach vendor endpoints directly
rules.remediation: Use the corporate artifact mirror (Nexus/Artifactory) instead of vendor URLs.

rules.description: MCP server config must not embed raw vendor API endpoints
rules.remediation: MCP servers must call the internal AI socle, not vendor APIs.

rules.description: Skill files must not reference vendor URLs (use socle endpoints)
rules.remediation: Replace vendor URL with corporate socle URL or remove.

rules.description: No plaintext Anthropic-style API key in any rendered file
rules.remediation: Store secrets in Vault/keychain; reference via env var at runtime.

rules.description: No plaintext OpenAI-style API key in any rendered file
rules.remediation: Move key to secure secret store; never commit.

rules.description: No plaintext Google/Gemini API key (AIza prefix) in rendered files
rules.remediation: Remove and reference via env var sourced from Vault.

rules.description: No PEM private keys embedded in rendered output
rules.remediation: Private keys must live in keychain/HSM, never on disk in the launcher bundle.

rules.description: No hardcoded Bearer tokens in scripts or configs
rules.remediation: Inject token from env at runtime (e.g. $CORP_TOKEN), never embed.

rules.description: If VPN_REQUIRED=yes, launcher must call check_vpn() before exec
rules.remediation: Add check_vpn() call at top of main(); abort with clear message if VPN absent.

rules.description: check_vpn must appear before any exec/spawn of the upstream CLI
rules.remediation: Move check_vpn() call above the exec/spawn line.

rules.description: Launcher must source BRANDING via --append-system-prompt-file
rules.remediation: Pass BRANDING.md via --append-system-prompt-file=$CORP_DIR/BRANDING.md.

rules.description: Launcher must source cyber-rules.md via --append-system-prompt-file
rules.remediation: Append cyber-rules.md as a system prompt file at launcher invocation.

rules.description: Each declared kill-switch env var must be exported in the launcher
rules.remediation: Add `export VAR=value` for every entry in KILL_SWITCHES.

rules.description: Disable Sentry/error reporting via env
rules.remediation: Export DISABLE_ERROR_REPORTING=1 before exec.

rules.description: Auto-update must be disabled (corp controls versioning)
rules.remediation: Export DISABLE_AUTOUPDATER=1 in the launcher.

rules.description: cyber-guard.py must be installed with 0555 (read+exec, no write)
rules.remediation: Add `chmod 555 "$INSTALL_DIR/cyber-guard.py"` in install.sh.

rules.description: settings.json must be installed with 0600 (owner-only)
rules.remediation: Add `chmod 600 "$INSTALL_DIR/settings.json"` after install.

rules.description: Launcher binary must be 0755 (world-exec, owner-write)
rules.remediation: Add `chmod 755 "$INSTALL_DIR/${CORP_SLUG}"` in installer.

rules.description: cyber-rules.md should be 0444 (read-only) to prevent local tampering
rules.remediation: Add `chmod 444 "$INSTALL_DIR/cyber-rules.md"`.

rules.description: FORBIDDEN_TERMS (Claude, Anthropic, OpenAI, Gemini) appear only in BRANDING.md
rules.remediation: Replace vendor name with corporate brand (e.g. 'Acme Copilot') outside BRANDING.

rules.description: BRANDING.md must define the rebrand identity (CORP_BRAND token)
rules.remediation: Ensure BRANDING.md states the corporate persona explicitly.

rules.description: NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 allowed only when ACCEPT_TLS_INSPECTION=yes
rules.remediation: Remove NODE_TLS_REJECT_UNAUTHORIZED=0 OR set ACCEPT_TLS_INSPECTION=yes after Cyber review.

rules.description: If ACCEPT_TLS_INSPECTION=yes, NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS must be set
rules.remediation: Export NODE_EXTRA_CA_CERTS=/path/to/corp-ca-bundle.pem in the launcher.

rules.description: If CC_NEEDS_STRIP_PROXY=yes, strip-proxy.js must be present in bundle
rules.remediation: Ship strip-proxy.js shim under bundle root.

rules.description: If CC_NEEDS_STRIP_PROXY=yes, launcher must spawn strip-proxy.js before exec
rules.remediation: Add `node $CORP_DIR/strip-proxy.js &` before exec and HTTPS_PROXY rewrite to localhost.

rules.description: Every mcpServers entry must be listed in settings.json allowedMcpServers
rules.remediation: Add each MCP server name to settings.json -> allowedMcpServers array.

rules.description: MCP server commands must not invoke a shell directly (no /bin/sh -c)
rules.remediation: Invoke binary directly with explicit args; avoid wrapping in a shell.

rules.description: settings.json permissions.deny must include vendor endpoints
rules.remediation: Add vendor host patterns under permissions.deny in settings.json.

rules.description: Installers must not pipe remote curl output to shell
rules.remediation: Download to a tempfile, verify checksum/signature, then execute.

rules.description: install.sh should verify checksum/signature of downloaded artifacts
rules.remediation: Compute and compare sha256 (or verify signature) before installing the artifact.
